name: Fair Market Value Transfer to Foreign Trust

eligibility.description: Applies to U.S. persons transferring property to foreign trusts where the transfer is a bona fide sale for FMV and gain is recognized.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Avoids being treated as the owner of a foreign trust (and the resulting U.S. tax on trust income) by transferring property in exchange for consideration of at least fair market value.
